message:
feat(e2e): add batch_runner module for matrix execution (bd-2als.3.3)

Implements the orchestration layer that was missing between the
existing executor/canonicalization/comparison infrastructure.

- BatchConfig: fixtures × presets × concurrency × seeds matrix
- run_matrix(): iterates all combinations, runs both engines, compares
- Three-tier hash assertion against preset's declared EquivalenceTier
- CellVerdict: Pass/Mismatch/Error per matrix cell
- BatchResult with JSONL serialization and markdown summary rendering
- fail_fast mode for CI vs full-report mode for local runs
- Preset dispatch covers all 11 catalog entries
- 10 unit tests (dispatch, tier satisfaction, serialization, rendering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -143,6 +143,12 @@ impl BatchResult {
     }
 }
 
+/// Convert elapsed duration to milliseconds as u64 (saturating).
+fn elapsed_ms(start: Instant) -> u64 {
+    let ms = start.elapsed().as_millis();
+    u64::try_from(ms).unwrap_or(u64::MAX)
+}
+
 // ── Preset dispatch ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
 /// Default scale values per preset.  Each returns a reasonable small-test
@@ -223,7 +229,7 @@ fn run_cell(

-            wall_time_ms: cell_start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64,
+            wall_time_ms: elapsed_ms(cell_start),
             sqlite_report: None,

@@ -232,46 +238,34 @@ fn run_cell(

         &[fixture_id],

             preset.name, fixture_id, concurrency, seed
         ),

-        Ok(ws) => ws,
-        Err(e) => {
-            return CellResult {
-                fixture_id: fixture_id.to_owned(),
-                preset_name: preset.name.clone(),
-                concurrency,
-                seed,
-                wall_time_ms: cell_start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64,
-                sqlite_report: None,
-                fsqlite_report: None,
-                tiered_comparison: None,
-                verdict: CellVerdict::Error(format!("workspace creation failed: {e}")),
-            };
-        }
+    ) else {
+        return make_error_cell(
+            fixture_id,
+            &preset.name,
+            concurrency,
+            seed,
+            cell_start,
+            "workspace creation failed".to_owned(),
+        );
     };
 
     // Find the DB path in the workspace.
-    let db_entry = match workspace.databases.iter().find(|d| d.db_id == fixture_id) {
-        Some(entry) => entry,
-        None => {
-            return CellResult {
-                fixture_id: fixture_id.to_owned(),
-                preset_name: preset.name.clone(),
-                concurrency,
-                seed,
-                wall_time_ms: cell_start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64,
-                sqlite_report: None,
-                fsqlite_report: None,
-                tiered_comparison: None,
-                verdict: CellVerdict::Error(format!("fixture {fixture_id} not found in workspace")),
-            };
-        }
+    let Some(db_entry) = workspace.databases.iter().find(|d| d.db_id == fixture_id) else {
+        return make_error_cell(
+            fixture_id,
+            &preset.name,
+            concurrency,
+            seed,
+            cell_start,
+            format!("fixture {fixture_id} not found in workspace"),
+        );
     };
 
     // Create two separate copies: one for each engine.
